query:
SELECT u.openId, u.id as user_id, u.name, u.email, COUNT(t.id) as track_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tracks t ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE u.openId IN ('mpYa77MuSngajE8ZPthPdM', 'FyDGTmvrk6Z8TdyN9L7QEP', '2jeqdC23QXeh6R6sWi7dMh', 'ESU5vMDerisHLbskGbjMhZ', 'user_3EbVWbR4l4YyhQHiMTO3vvvafF5')
GROUP BY u.id
HAVING track_count > 0
ORDER BY u.openId, track_count DESC;
